principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Retro Arcade + Modern Web3 + Kid Education.
Content is King: Every pixel tells the story of 'Chaos Unlocked'.
Zoom In: Focus on pixel details and neon glows.
Negative Space: Use black void to make neons pop.

headings.usage: Main titles, Hero text, Game titles

sections.hero: Asymmetrical. Left: Text + CTAs. Right: Massive Pixel Art Scene. Logo must be SMALLER (max-w-xs).
sections.arcade_zone: Bento Grid. Mix of 2x2 (Featured Game) and 1x1 (Mini Games) cards.
sections.book_section: 3D Carousel or Horizontal Scroll with 'Tilt' effect on covers.
sections.parent_zone: Clean, trustworthy, less neon. White/Light Grey text on dark bg. Shield icons.

buttons.primary: Pixelated border (box-shadow hack), Neon Pink bg, White text, Hover: Glitch effect.
buttons.secondary: Hollow Neon Cyan border, Transparent bg, Cyan text, Hover: Fill Cyan.
buttons.cta_text: INSERT COIN, START GAME, UNLOCK CHAOS

cards.game_card: Dark bg, Neon border glow on hover, Pixelated corners.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay with low opacity repeating linear gradient.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons (Pixel style if available)

motion.hover: Scale 1.05, Glitch effect, Neon Glow intensity increase.
motion.scroll: Fade in up, Staggered reveal for grid items.
motion.floating: Continuous slow float for background elements (coins, controllers).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. HERO LOGO: The user explicitly requested a SMALLER logo. Ensure the BlockQuest logo in the hero is max-w-[200px] or max-w-xs.
2. CURIOSITY: Add 'Secret' hover states. Example: Hovering over a coin plays a sound or spins it. Hidden 'Easter Eggs' in the UI.
3. PARENT ZONE: Keep this section visually distinct—calmer, more structured, to build trust.
4. DO NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very large heading.
5. USE 'Press Start 2P' sparingly (Headings only) to ensure readability.
6. IMPLEMENT a 'Konami Code' listener (optional but cool) that triggers a confetti explosion.

do_not: Do not use rounded corners > 4px (keep it boxy/pixelated).
Do not clutter the screen—use negative space to let the neon breathe.
must_do: Ensure contrast ratios are met even with neon colors (use dark fills behind text if needed).
Make it responsive—mobile users should still feel the arcade vibe.
